title: BroMenu Data Model
html:
Stub. The Supabase schema backing BroMenu / Brotein. As of 2025 07 09 screenshot 2025 07 09 at 4 51 29 pm 720cb8bf (the visible columns in the table editor):

  • menu_items.id uuid (random v4)
  • menu_items.restaurant_id uuid (seed-numbered: 6e9b7a10-0001-0001-0001-00000000000X)
  • menu_items.name text
  • menu_items.description text (mostly NULL)

Nutrition columns (calories, protein_g, carbs_g, fat_g, sodium_mg, serving_size) are not visible in the screenshot — likely live in a join table (menu_item_nutrition?) or were added after the July 17–18 OCR scrape sprint. Worth re-densifying once a future raw source confirms.
